message:
Add comprehensive unit test coverage for presenter and style modules

ftui-render presenter tests:
- Single-write-per-frame behavior verification
- Synchronized output fallback when capability disabled
- Cursor tracking after wide characters
- Cursor position after multiple runs on different rows
- Style with all flags applied
- Style transitions between different colors
- Link at buffer boundaries (first/last cell)
- Link state cleared after reset
- Link transitions (linked->unlinked->linked)
- Multiple presents maintain correct state
- Style state persistence verification across frames

ftui-style merge semantic tests:
- Merge chain with three styles (grandchild->child->parent)
- Attribute accumulation through merge chain
- has_attr behavior with None attrs
- has_attr with set flags
- attrs() method sets directly
- attrs() method overwrites previous
- Explicit transparent color handling in merge
- Independent field merging verification
- Style Copy, Eq, and Hash trait verification
- StyleFlags contains combined flags
- StyleFlags::NONE as identity for union
- StyleFlags remove nonexistent is noop

Closes bd-2nu8.6.4 and bd-2nu8.7.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Verify event decoding and hit-testing behavior (widgets + hit grid).

Acceptance:
- Dedicated script + expected output/fixtures.
- Logs include PTY capture + structured JSON summary.

 {"id":"bd-2nu8.6","title":"Unit coverage gaps: ftui-render","description":"ftui-render coverage gap closure.

Scope:
- Cell/CellAttrs/CellContent: width semantics, continuation cells.
- PackedRgba blending and alpha semantics.
- Buffer operations: set/get/clear/scissor/opacity/wide glyphs.
- Diff: run grouping + row skip correctness.
- Presenter: style/link/cursor tracking, sync output boundaries.

Constraints: real buffers/presenter; no mocks.
Acceptance: coverage target met; gaps from bd-2nu8.1 closed with tests.
